footer.tagline: Trusted platform for daily workers in Indonesia.

home.heroTitle: Find Trusted Daily Workers, No Middlemen.
home.heroDescription: A platform connecting daily freelance workers with businesses in Indonesia. Find daily jobs or hire trusted workers with ease.
home.qualityQuote: Service quality begins with quality people.
home.aboutDescription: Daily Worker Hub is a platform that connects daily freelance workers with businesses in Indonesia. We're here to eliminate middlemen and create a transparent and fair work ecosystem.
home.forWorkersDesc: Find daily jobs without middlemen. Build your reputation, get transaction protection, and manage your earnings in one platform.
home.forBusinessFeatureDesc: Recruit trusted daily workers with a rating and verification system. Pay workers directly, with no hidden fees.
home.protectionDesc: Protection Fund protects both parties. Secure transactions with the Escrow System and community reputation verification.
home.tractionStats: Currently, 10,000+ verified workers and 500+ active businesses use our platform — all without middlemen.
home.sideIncomeDesc: Daily Worker Hub is designed for those with other commitments — students, part-time workers, or anyone looking to earn extra income without being tied to a full-time contract.
home.sideIncome1: Take shifts on your own schedule — no minimum work hours.
home.sideIncome2: No daily obligations or long-term contracts.
home.sideIncome3: All you need: a smartphone, internet connection, and willingness to work.
home.sideIncome4: Get paid directly after each shift — no waiting for weekly payouts.
home.flexibleDesc: Take shifts on your own schedule. No minimum work hours. No daily obligations.
home.forBusinessDesc: Find daily workers with verified track records. Our system provides attendance data, trust scores, and work history — so you can make better hiring decisions.
home.forBusiness1: QR code check-in — monitor real-time attendance on-site.
home.forBusiness2: Automatic payment after each shift — no manual follow-up.
home.forBusiness3: Integrated regulatory compliance monitoring in one platform.
home.forBusiness4: Two-way rating & review system to maintain quality.
home.structuredDesc: Structured recruitment, transparent payments, and automatic regulatory protection.
home.howBusinessStep2Desc: Set position, date, number of workers, and budget.
home.howBusinessStep3Desc: Review worker reputation and history before selecting.
home.howBusinessStep4Desc: Workers check-in via QR code at the location.
home.howBusinessStep5Desc: Funds transferred automatically after shift completion.
home.howWorkerStep1Desc: Upload basic info, photo, and start verification.
home.howWorkerStep2Desc: Filter by position, area, and availability.
home.howWorkerStep3Desc: No need to send messages or contact middlemen.
home.howWorkerStep4Desc: Scan QR code for attendance confirmation.
home.howWorkerStep5Desc: Payment transferred to wallet after shift.
home.pricingSub: Clear fee structure for all parties.
home.communityCTA: Build Together with the Indonesian Workforce Community
home.communityCTADesc: Daily Worker Hub is more than a platform — it's a community where workers and businesses protect each other and build better work standards. Join in the early stage. Your voice and participation will shape how this platform evolves.
home.communityLinkLabel: Discussions, articles, and community feedback available at
